title: Horizontal: Better Storage
description:
While you're in the Copper Age, you'll accumulate a lot of materials. A single chest won't cut it.

Sophisticated Storage gives you much better options:
• §lBasic Chest§r (27 slots) — wood
• §lCopper Chest§r (36 slots) — copper
• §lIron Chest§r (45 slots) — iron (gated behind, well, iron)

Upgrade your storage! Copper chests are a great mid-point. You can also upgrade existing chests by shift+right-clicking with the upgrade item.

Later, Sophisticated Backpacks will give you portable storage too.
